'''Framjem Spathen''' made psychedelic [[Music/Legends|music]] videos around [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]].

He had glowing [[Hair/Legends|hair]], [[Diamond/Legends|diamonds]] implanted in his skin, and extra muscles surgically implanted in his body.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
